name: eggyrooch-blip--openclaw-team-builder
description: Manage OpenClaw agent teams — add agents, deploy templates, health check, auto-fix, view org tree, rollback, goal-driven team suggestion. Use when user mentions: team management, add agent, org chart, health check, deploy solo template, rollback, suggest team, recommend agents. Triggers: "加个助手", "新增 Agent", "看看团队", "组织架构", "体检", "修复", "回退", "超级个体", "推荐团队", "建议配置", "team builder", "add agent", "suggest team", "渠道", "channel", "绑定", "飞书配置".
